customManagers.description: Handles mise tools with explicit # renovate: packageName=... datasource=... annotations. Built-in mise manager ignores those annotations, so tools it can't resolve natively (e.g. claude-code) would otherwise never update. If duplicate PRs appear for tools the built-in mise manager also handles, add a packageRules entry disabling the mise manager for the annotated tools and leave them to this regex only. Defer until observed.
Kitty terminal — version is in a comment line because the official installer script takes it as an argument, not a variable assignment.

packageRules.description: For tools listed below, both the built-in mise manager and the custom regex manager open PRs for the same bump. Disable the mise manager; the regex manager handles the bump using the upstream slug from the `# renovate: packageName=...` annotation. Add other tools here only if/when duplicate PRs are observed for them.
